nodes.name: Webhook — MonsterMQ Oven Z3 Drift
nodes._comment: MonsterMQ Flow rule: on topic bakery-works-utrecht/line-a/baking/tunnel-oven-01/zone-3/temperature < 195 AND zone-3/product-present = true FOR 30s → HTTP POST

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={ "@type": "MessageCard", "summary": "Oven Z3 drift SOLVE-A", "themeColor": "FFA500", "sections": [ { "activityTitle": "⚠ Oven Zone 3 drift — batch {{ $json.batch_id }}", "facts": [ {"name":"Huidige temp","value":"{{ $json.current_temp }}°C"}, {"name":"Min 5min","value":"{{ $json.min_temp_5min }}°C"}, {"name":"Spec","value":"{{ $json.spec_window }}"}, {"name":"Ack voor","value":"{{ $json.ack_deadline }}"} ] } ], "potentialAction": [ { "@type": "HttpPOST", "name": "Approve auto-correctie (+5°C)", "target": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/bakery/oven-drift/ack?batch={{ $json.batch_id }}&action=approve" }, { "@type": "HttpPOST", "name": "Escaleer plant-manager", "target": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/bakery/oven-drift/ack?batch={{ $json.batch_id }}&action=escalate" }, { "@type": "HttpPOST", "name": "Reject — batch afkeuren", "target": "http://n8n:5678/webhook/bakery/oven-drift/ack?batch={{ $json.batch_id }}&action=reject" } ] }

nodes.name: MongoDB — Log event (pending)
nodes._comment: event_status starts as 'pending', updated by /ack callback to approved/escalated/rejected
